message:
feat(core): add deterministic test harness for reproducible E2E/PTY testing

Add test_harness module providing shared utilities for deterministic
clocks, seeded randomness, stable ID generation, and reproducible
environment capture. Test suites use these primitives so CI failures
can be reproduced with a single seed value.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
